MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Defendants Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James Patrick; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants Henry Rosenthal and Carola Anderson.
Andrew Westley; Law Office of Andrew Westley; 415-362-2817; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiffs Jose Golaw and Brittany Sterling Fromm.

Defendants contest the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS HENRY ROSENTHAL and CAROLA ANDERSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to the bad faith. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with CCP 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint In Each Action
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James Patrick; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants Henry Rosenthal and Carola Anderson.
Andrew Westley; Law Office of Andrew Westley; 415-362-2817; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiffs Jose Golaw and Brittany Sterling Fromm.

Defendants contest the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS JOSE GOLAW and BRITTANY FROMM's Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint In Each Action is GRANTED in part. Motion for leave to amend in action 583200 is granted. No opposition filed. To the extent motion purports to seek a leave to amend inaction 583202 the motion is denied as it is not properly calendared in that action. (Actions have not been consolidated for all purposes and motions have to be filed separately in each case). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
